pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script creates file at this exact path via heredoc
env.json (line 21: upstream_url https://www.bridgecommand.co.uk) and setup_bridgecommand.sh (line 48) confirm /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios is the correct Bridge Command scenarios directory
DDM conversion: 50° 47.40' N = 50 + 47.40/60 = 50.7900. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 22: '50° 47.40' N, 001° 18.00' W'
DDM conversion: 001° 18.00' W = -(1 + 18/60) = -1.3000. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 22
DDM conversion: 50° 47.40' N = 50.7900. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 23
DDM conversion: 001° 17.00' W = -(1 + 17/60) = -1.283333... ≈ -1.2833. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 23
DDM conversion: 50° 46.80' N = 50 + 46.80/60 = 50.7800. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 24
DDM conversion: 001° 17.00' W = -1.2833. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 24
DDM conversion: 50° 46.80' N = 50.7800. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 25
DDM conversion: 001° 18.00' W = -1.3000. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 25
DDM conversion: 50° 47.10' N = 50 + 47.10/60 = 50.785 ≈ 50.7850. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 31
DDM conversion: 001° 17.50' W = -(1 + 17.50/60) = -1.291666... ≈ -1.2917. NTM source in setup_task.sh line 31

Geographic calculation: at latitude 50.78°N, 0.002° tolerance ≈ 200m (0.2 km latitude × 0.1 km longitude), reasonable for maritime navigation simulation. Web source: Bridge Command (https://www.bridgecommand.co.uk/) is a real maritime simulator used for navigation training.

Task description (line 5): 'In environment.ini, set the location to Solent'. Bramble Bank confirmed to be in central Solent via Web search (https://latitude.to/articles-by-country/gb/united-kingdom/97427/bramble-bank)
Web search for Bramble Bank location. Task coordinates form a training exclusion zone around this real-world location.

privileged_info_summary: The NTM Dredging Zone Setup task uses a synthetic training scenario based on the real-world Bramble Bank location in the Solent (50.7902°N, 1.2858°W). The task requires agents to create a Bridge Command scenario with a fictional 4-corner exclusion zone (Points A-D: 50.79°N/50.78°N, -1.30°W/-1.2833°W) and a central dredger vessel (50.7850°N, -1.2917°W). All ground truth coordinates are correctly converted from DDM (Degrees Decimal Minutes) format to DD (Decimal Degrees) format, with a 0.002° tolerance (~200m). The synthetic NTM file (NTM_2024_042.txt) references a fictional dredger 'MV SAND PIPER' at the zone center. Bridge Command is verified as a real GPL-2.0 open-source maritime simulator.
